title: World War I Texture Pack
description: Turn your Minecraft world into a World War I battlefield! Equip authentic weapons, uniforms, items, and themed blocks to recreate epic wartime scenarios.
body:
![ww1-title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5958ec04e4e3567a7c2f5b4faefc2cb6ec665106.png)
##
📘 **Check the guide to discover all additional items [here](https://zachopixel.com/texture-packs/ww1/guide)**

⚠️ **This texture pack requires OptiFine or CIT Resewn mod to work properly.**
##
### 🌍 Discover World War I
Transform your Minecraft world into a true **World War I battlefield!** Equip weapons, uniforms, themed items, and blocks to recreate intense trench warfare and war-torn landscapes.
## 
### 🎨 Theme & Textures
The textures are designed to immerse you in a harsh and realistic war setting, **with a somber aesthetic and desaturated tones** that reflect human suffering, and the wear of the front lines. With a wide variety of blocks and items, you can build trenches, fortifications, and more to faithfully recreate the atmosphere of the conflict.
## 
### 🔪 Enhanced Combat
Beyond war-themed textures, World War I **includes a wide variety of guns and items**: uniforms, rifles, pistols, machine guns, melee weapons, grenades, and more. All of this is enhanced by immersive sounds—realistic gunfire, explosions, bullet impacts, and screams—that put you in the heart of total war.
## 
### 🧰 Custom Weapons & Uniforms
To fully enjoy this resource pack, **you’ll need OptiFine or CIT Resewn installed**.
How does it work? By renaming certain items using an anvil, you’ll change their appearance and unlock unique visual variants.

📜 See the full list of available items here: https://zachopixel.com/texture-packs/ww1/guide
